The '''''Bantha''-class troop carrier assault shuttle''', also known as an '''Assault Carrier''', was a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] developed by [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] engineers for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:BanthaAssaultCloseUp.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] [[Quad turbolaser cannon/Legends|turbolasers]].]]

The ''Bantha''-class assault shuttle was a large craft intended primarily for planetary assault missions and [[Commando/Legends|commando]] raids. It was heavily armed, mounting a pair [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] [[Quad turbolaser cannon/Legends|quad turbolasers]], and equipped with heavy armor and shields. It also possessed a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], allowing the shuttle to be used for long-range missions without the assistance of a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]].

The ''Bantha''-class shuttle was operated from a raised command pod on the port side of the ship's dorsal hull, and troops were carried in a lower hull with three large forward hatches. Commandos often jumped from these hatches to ground level during rapid assaults. Two long booms extended forward of the main hull. On the ground, the shuttle was balanced on a single oversized landing gear.

==History==
In the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] early years during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Bantha''-class was developed as a response to the [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]]. It was larger and more heavily armored than its [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] counterpart, and mounted a heavier armament.

The ''Bantha''-class assault shuttle first appeared during the assault on [[Oradin]] at the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]], and also played an important role in the [[evacuation of Ciutric]].
